name: Entergy New Orleans LLC First Mortgage Bonds 5.0% Series due December 1 2052
summary: Entergy New Orleans LLC is a subsidiary of Entergy Corporation that provides electricity and natural gas services to the city of New Orleans, Louisiana. These bonds represent debt obligations of Entergy New Orleans, secured by a first mortgage on the company's assets. The principal will be repaid on December 1, 2052 and the company is headquartered in New Orleans, LA.
